name: qBittorrent
description: Free and reliable P2P Bittorrent client
compose:
name: slashnode-qbittorrent
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/qbittorrent:release-5.2.2
    container_name: qbittorrent
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8094:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-qbittorrent_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-qbittorrent_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Ported from Umbrel (qbittorrent). Upstream: https://qbittorrent.org/. qBittorrent prints a random temporary WebUI password for user 'admin' to its log on each start — open the logs panel, then set a permanent password in the WebUI. Default login — user: "admin", password: "adminadmin". ⚠️ ships a default password ("adminadmin") — must be changed on first login.
